📰 By Frankel; dam won the Group 3 Albany (6f) as 2yo and bred Group-placed Agenda (1m4f) for this yard; clung on for 7f maiden win at the Curragh on second start but was a better horse in the autumn, not having much to race against when involved in a scramble for second in a Group 3 at Newmarket (1m, good to firm) then bogged down by the class rise and/or very soft ground in the Group 1 Criterium International at Saint-Cloud; likely to do better as a 3yo over this longer trip; good chance with sights lowered.
🧠 Model's top pick. Top-rated in the field (RPR 116, TS 94); comfortably handles this class; on an improving trajectory; going conditions are ideal; in-form trainer (A P O'Brien), top jockey booked; drifting in the market (4/9 → 8/13, 41% longer); market price confirms model confidence.

📰 170,000euros yearling; unraced dam's winning siblings include Raheen House (1m5f; Group 3) and Shraaoh (Australian 2m Group 1); a warm order for Chelmsford AW debut (1m) in December and although workmanlike rather than impressive in beating rivals who mostly look handicappers in the making, he did finish with purpose; should leave that form well behind over a more suitable trip for yard that's won five of the last ten runnings; entered in the Dante and the Derby.

        "fair_odds": "3.88",
        "best_dec": "2.25",
        "edge": "-22.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Back from a wind operation when winning comfortably last week at Pontefract (6f, good); carries a penalty but should be hard to beat if as good again, as returning to 7f won't hinder her at all."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Me Tarzan",
        "jockey": "Harry Vigors(5)",
        "trainer": "Archie Watson",
        "ts": "65",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "72",
        "form": "-64641",
        "sire": "Bungle Inthejungle",
        "dam_sire": "Camacho",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "55.6",
        "model_pct": "24.5%",
        "fair_odds": "4.08",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "+0.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Four wins divided between AW and turf; ideally positioned through the race when narrowly scoring at Kempton (7f) but this consistent 4yo has clear claims."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Mr Ubiquitous",
        "jockey": "Jack Callan",
        "trainer": "Harry Eustace",
        "ts": "60",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "1579-1",
        "sire": "Massaat",
        "dam_sire": "Bertolini",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-11",
        "score": "54.4",
        "model_pct": "21.1%",
        "fair_odds": "4.74",
        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "-6.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Strike-rate of 6-16 so he knows how to win and only 3lb higher than for his half-length reappearance success at Kempton (7f, AW); every chance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Noble Guest (GB)",
        "jockey": "Harry Burns",
        "trainer": "George Margarson",
        "ts": "78",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "15156-",
        "sire": "Mohaather",
        "dam_sire": "Gone West",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "50.4",
        "model_pct": "12.8%",
        "fair_odds": "7.78",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-2.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Had 15 races; second career win when prevailing narrowly over C&D in September and following efforts weren't too shoddy; still on a competitive mark but he does lack a recent run."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Way To Dubai",
        "jockey": "Mason Paetel(3)",
        "trainer": "Michael Appleby",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "735380",
        "sire": "Holy Roman Emperor",
        "dam_sire": "Harbour Watch",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "46.9",
        "model_pct": "8.2%",
        "fair_odds": "12.13",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has won only once since making his British debut in October 2023; has threatened plenty of times but has been very poor in last two races."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Dancing Terror",
        "jockey": "Jack Dace(3)",
        "trainer": "Amanda Perrett",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "82",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "1/2-00",
        "sire": "Territories",
        "dam_sire": "Proclamation",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "46.2",
        "model_pct": "7.6%",
        "fair_odds": "13.22",
        "best_dec": "41.00",
        "edge": "+3.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "First and second in two 7f novices at Lingfield the winter before last, but having been off for a year, he's trailed home last in 1m/7f handicaps (tried a hood and blinkers last time); makes turf debut with lots to prove."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Southwell (AW)",
    "time": "14:20",
    "race_name": "Celebrate With Sponsorship At Southwell Racecourse Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "AW",
    "dist": "7f",
    "going": "Standard",
    "class": "Class 6",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Split Elevens (GB)",
        "jockey": "David Probert",
        "trainer": "John Butler",
        "ts": "66",
        "rpr": "69",
        "or": "58",
        "form": "83-745",
        "sire": "Ajaya",
        "dam_sire": "Act One",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "56.4",
        "model_pct": "20.3%",
        "fair_odds": "4.93",
        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "-6.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ten-time AW winner; just a respectable fifth at Wolverhampton (7f) this month but remains on a workable mark and can't be ignored."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Fistral Beach",
        "jockey": "Jack Doughty",
        "trainer": "John Mackie",
        "ts": "59",
        "rpr": "69",
        "or": "59",
        "form": "251312",
        "sire": "New Bay",
        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "54.5",
        "model_pct": "15.9%",
        "fair_odds": "6.28",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-1.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Dual 7f winner at Wolverhampton this year, latterly when holding on well in first-time cheekpieces last month; probably bettered that form when second from wide stall there 18 days; respected in current mood."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Hint Of The Jungle",
        "jockey": "Kieran O'Neill",
        "trainer": "Mike Murphy",
        "ts": "60",
        "rpr": "70",
        "or": "60",
        "form": "-52115",
        "sire": "Bungle Inthejungle",
        "dam_sire": "Fast Company",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "51.7",
        "model_pct": "11.1%",
        "fair_odds": "9.05",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-6.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won twice over 7f (once here) in February and confirmed his wellbeing with respectable fifth at Kempton (6f) this month; probably doesn't have much margin for error off current mark but ought to be in the shake-up again."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "River Wharfe",
        "jockey": "Myla Coppins(7)",
        "trainer": "Tony Carroll",
        "ts": "56",
        "rpr": "71",
        "or": "57",
        "form": "237186",
        "sire": "Showcasing",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "50.4",
        "model_pct": "9.4%",
        "fair_odds": "10.68",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "+1.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "11-time winner, most recently from off the pace over C&D last month; not in same form on either 8.6f start at Wolverhampton since, though, and might still be a shade too high in the weights."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "King Sharja (GB)",
        "jockey": "Joanna Mason",
        "trainer": "Ruth Carr",
        "ts": "52",
        "rpr": "71",
        "or": "56",
        "form": "01403-",
        "sire": "Kingman",
        "dam_sire": "Pivotal",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "49.0",
        "model_pct": "7.8%",
        "fair_odds": "12.76",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Scored off 2lb higher over C&D last April and was also on target off today's mark on turf last summer; ran well when fresh last year and has a fighting chance if fully tuned up for this reappearance outing."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "English Lady (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Alexandra Egan(7)",
        "trainer": "Dean Ivory",
        "ts": "61",
        "rpr": "70",
        "or": "57",
        "form": "3130-3",
        "sire": "Inns Of Court",
        "dam_sire": "Makfi",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "48.0",
        "model_pct": "7.0%",
        "fair_odds": "14.38",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-5.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Dual 7f Polytrack winner; did well to finish third over C&D on recent seasonal debut, having endured a wide trip from stall 12, and is still quite lightly raced after only 12 starts; high on the list."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Ballybaymoonshiner (FR)",
        "jockey": "Lewis Edmunds",
        "trainer": "Murty McGrath",
        "ts": "17",
        "rpr": "71",
        "or": "54",
        "form": "44130-",
        "sire": "Dandy Man",
        "dam_sire": "Whipper",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "47.7",
        "model_pct": "6.7%",
        "fair_odds": "15.00",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Gained all four wins on Polytrack, the latest last May; returned from break with poor run in December and has wide draw for this first start since; others have much stronger claims."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Brother Dave",
        "jockey": "James Sullivan",
        "trainer": "Ruth Carr",
        "ts": "57",
        "rpr": "71",
        "or": "48",
        "form": "124336",
        "sire": "Pastoral Pursuits",
        "dam_sire": "Inchinor",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "8-11",
        "score": "47.3",
        "model_pct": "6.4%",
        "fair_odds": "15.70",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Returned from break with hard-fought C&D win in January and has held his form pretty well since, albeit his latest run was a shade disappointing; current mark is workable; no surprise if he features."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Saisons d'Or",
        "jockey": "Jack Garritty",
        "trainer": "Jedd O'Keeffe",
        "ts": "63",
        "rpr": "70",
        "or": "59",
        "form": "6-8704",
        "sire": "Havana Gold",
        "dam_sire": "Chineur",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "45.1",
        "model_pct": "4.8%",
        "fair_odds": "20.90",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-5.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Returned from break with three down-the-field runs this year but his fourth of ten over C&D three weeks ago was a big step back in the right direction and he's another 2lb lower today; considered each-way."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Dolly's Delight",
        "jockey": "Jason Hart",
        "trainer": "Ivan Furtado",
        "ts": "48",
        "rpr": "69",
        "or": "58",
        "form": "1693-6",
        "sire": "Kuroshio",
        "dam_sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "44.7",
        "model_pct": "4.6%",
        "fair_odds": "21.90",
        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "-0.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won over an extended 7f on turf last summer and was subsequently placed over 6f on Tapeta; made underwhelming reappearance this month and has wide draw today but might have needed that recent outing and may by aided by the new tongue-tie."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Kamekist (GB)",
        "jockey": "David Nolan",
        "trainer": "Ivan Furtado",
        "ts": "49",
        "rpr": "72",
        "or": "54",
        "form": "000-37",

        "dam_sire": "Dutch Art",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "42.7",
        "model_pct": "3.5%",
        "fair_odds": "28.17",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-2.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Unable to land a telling blow when favourite here (6f) this month but was close third off much-reduced mark here two starts ago and ought to be suited by today's return to 7f; tongue-tie removed after one use; it might pay to give him another chance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "Reenie's Dream",
        "jockey": "Paul Mulrennan",
        "trainer": "Bryan Smart",
        "ts": "54",
        "rpr": "71",
        "or": "56",
        "form": "50-994",
        "sire": "Nathaniel",
        "dam_sire": "Dark Angel",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "40.4",
        "model_pct": "2.6%",
        "fair_odds": "37.79",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-3.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Quirky maiden who has often shown a tendency to race too freely and who lost all chance when virtually refusing to race on penultimate start; did well to take fourth over C&D last month, but remains a risky option."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Epsom",
    "time": "14:40",
    "race_name": "Betfred Blue Riband Trial Stakes (Listed Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m2f",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 1",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "New Zealand (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Ryan Moore",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "94",
        "rpr": "116",
        "or": "106",
        "form": "7145-",
        "sire": "Frankel",
        "dam_sire": "Dabirsim",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "68.1",
        "model_pct": "37.7%",
        "fair_odds": "2.65",
        "best_dec": "1.62",
        "edge": "-28.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "By Frankel; dam won the Group 3 Albany (6f) as 2yo and bred Group-placed Agenda (1m4f) for this yard; clung on for 7f maiden win at the Curragh on second start but was a better horse in the autumn, not having much to race against when involved in a scramble for second in a Group 3 at Newmarket (1m, good to firm) then bogged down by the class rise and/or very soft ground in the Group 1 Criterium International at Saint-Cloud; likely to do better as a 3yo over this longer trip; good chance with sights lowered."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Saxon Street (IRE)",
        "jockey": "William Buick",
        "trainer": "John & Thady Gosden",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "1-",
        "sire": "Saxon Warrior",
        "dam_sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "64.1",
        "model_pct": "25.3%",
        "fair_odds": "3.95",
        "best_dec": "3.75",
        "edge": "-4.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "170,000euros yearling; unraced dam's winning siblings include Raheen House (1m5f; Group 3) and Shraaoh (Australian 2m Group 1); a warm order for Chelmsford AW debut (1m) in December and although workmanlike rather than impressive in beating rivals who mostly look handicappers in the making, he did finish with purpose; should leave that form well behind over a more suitable trip for yard that's won five of the last ten runnings; entered in the Dante and the Derby."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Balzac",
        "jockey": "Hollie Doyle",
        "trainer": "Jane Chapple-Hyam",
        "ts": "67",
        "rpr": "100",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "3-1",
        "sire": "Japan",
        "dam_sire": "High Chaparral",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "57.2",
        "model_pct": "12.7%",
        "fair_odds": "7.87",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Winning siblings include Claymore, a Group 3 winner at 1m2f for this yard; lots to like about his persevering third of seven in a good 1m Newmarket maiden (22-1; ridden by 7lb claimer) on debut but he didn't need any more than that form when making all on Kempton AW (1m) this month; Derby entry who should make a better 3yo but how much better will be clearer after today."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Rebel Rocker (GB)",
        "jockey": "Rob Hornby",
        "trainer": "Faye Bramley",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "1-",
        "sire": "Cityscape",
        "dam_sire": "Verglas",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "55.0",
        "model_pct": "10.3%",
        "fair_odds": "9.75",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Derby entry; nibbled at in the market for 1m debut on Kempton AW in November where he made a good impression with the way he made up ground to win quite convincingly; his rivals had some limitations though and although this one should improve he is asked a big question today."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Pearl River (GB)",
        "jockey": "Alec Voikhansky",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "83",
        "rpr": "98",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "65431-",
        "sire": "Cotai Glory",
        "dam_sire": "Sinndar",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "51.3",
        "model_pct": "7.1%",
        "fair_odds": "14.13",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+2.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "All five races on good or slower; middling form on first three starts but was all the better for the step up to 1m2f on final two runs and his stamina was much in evidence when forging clear in a Nottingham handicap (good to soft), despite running green; needs to have come on a ton over the winter to play a part and the track and good to firm ground are other queries."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Menzies (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Tom Marquand",
        "trainer": "Harry Eustace",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "94",
        "or": "81",
        "form": "513",
        "sire": "Australia",
        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "51.2",
        "model_pct": "7.0%",
        "fair_odds": "14.34",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+2.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "One sibling was a Graded winner at 1m3f and 1m1f in US; took a step forward from 7f debut on Kempton AW when making the running and not for catching over 1m there in February; had more to do under a penalty at Southwell since and he fell short so now relies on big improvement for the step up in trip."
      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Yarmouth",
    "time": "14:47",
    "race_name": "Free Tips Daily On attheraces.com Maiden Stakes (GBB Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "6f",
    "going": "Good To Firm",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "low",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Nevasca Cinza (GB)",
        "jockey": "Daniel Muscutt",
        "trainer": "James Fanshawe",
        "ts": "72",
        "rpr": "82",
        "or": "81",
        "form": "32-4",
        "sire": "Havana Grey",
        "dam_sire": "Medicean",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "58.8",
        "model_pct": "28.7%",
        "fair_odds": "3.48",
        "best_dec": "1.73",
        "edge": "-32.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "All runs over 6f; left the Russell/Scudamore stable for 100,000gns in October (gelded afterwards) after competitive shows at Carlisle and Hamilton; produced another on yard debut in a good-looking novice at Leicester; sets the standard and should have a lot more to offer."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Creative Queen",
        "jockey": "Cieren Fallon",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "72",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "2-6",
        "sire": "Mitole",
        "dam_sire": "Quality Road",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "55.0",
        "model_pct": "22.8%",
        "fair_odds": "4.38",
        "best_dec": "3.00",
        "edge": "-11.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "800,000euros breeze-up 2yo; a beaten favourite in both her races, in a three-runner event last year and only midfield at Kempton (7f) three weeks ago; still early days but it's been an underwhelming start."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Firewalker",
        "jockey": "David Egan",
        "trainer": "Kevin Philippart De Foy",
        "ts": "30",
        "rpr": "75",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "2-9",
        "sire": "Kingman",
        "dam_sire": "Arcano",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "49.8",
        "model_pct": "16.6%",
        "fair_odds": "6.04",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-5.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Cost 360,000gns as a foal; beaten at 1-4 on debut and cut out quickly when again prominent in the betting at Doncaster (7f) one month ago; held a 2,000 Guineas entry that day but not now; may step up but has to."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Izzy Fast (GB)",
        "jockey": "Silvestre De Sousa",
        "trainer": "Philip McBride",
        "ts": "32",
        "rpr": "56",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "95-",

        "dam_sire": "Aussie Rules",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-11",
        "score": "47.8",
        "model_pct": "14.6%",
        "fair_odds": "6.84",
        "best_dec": "101.00",
        "edge": "+12.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Modest RPRs in her first two races and doesn't look up to winning a maiden."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Shining Guest (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Marco Ghiani",
        "trainer": "George Margarson",
        "ts": "26",
        "rpr": "54",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "67-",

        "dam_sire": "Bated Breath",

        "spotlight": "Beaten about 12l at Nottingham ten days ago (6f, good) when a 100-1 chance; the hood is retained."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Southwell (AW)",
    "time": "14:55",
    "race_name": "Wright Vigar Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "AW",
    "dist": "5f",
    "going": "Standard",
    "class": "Class 6",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Man On A Mission (GB)",
        "jockey": "Liam Wright(5)",
        "trainer": "P Charalambous & J Clutterbuck",
        "ts": "62",
        "rpr": "67",
        "or": "52",
        "form": "252742",
        "sire": "Swiss Spirit",
        "dam_sire": "Bertolini",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "50.4",
        "model_pct": "20.9%",
        "fair_odds": "4.79",
        "best_dec": "2.38",
        "edge": "-23.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Seven AW wins have come elsewhere but he has often run well over C&D and did so again when only narrowly failing to end a losing run here on Saturday; had no problem with returning to 5f for the first time in over a year and a likely candidate."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Invitorio",
        "jockey": "James Sullivan",
        "trainer": "Ruth Carr",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "69",
        "or": "54",
        "form": "7-8921",
        "sire": "Invincible Army",
        "dam_sire": "Exceed And Excel",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "49.3",
        "model_pct": "18.2%",
        "fair_odds": "5.48",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "First win over 6f and he's spent nearly all his handicapping life at that trip and 7f; however, the drop to 5f has worked well for him on last two starts, finishing strongly into second at Catterick then won over C&D 13 days ago; had little in hand there but just 3lb higher now; solid chance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Marcus (GB)",
        "jockey": "Connor Beasley",
        "trainer": "Charlie Wallis",
        "ts": "55",
        "rpr": "65",
        "or": "46",
        "form": "34-446",
        "sire": "Twilight Son",
        "dam_sire": "Medicean",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "47.5",
        "model_pct": "14.8%",
        "fair_odds": "6.78",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "+2.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Still a maiden but there isn't much between him and Arlington on C&D form in October and although he was beaten before the 6f trip became an issue at Chelmsford in February he can't be ruled out on return from a break."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Arlington",
        "jockey": "Tom Kiely-Marshall(5)",
        "trainer": "Bryan Smart",
        "ts": "57",
        "rpr": "65",
        "or": "55",
        "form": "30-170",
        "sire": "Washington DC",
        "dam_sire": "Mineshaft",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "47.4",
        "model_pct": "14.5%",
        "fair_odds": "6.91",
        "best_dec": "4.33",
        "edge": "-10.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three front-running C&D wins between last May and January; below best on last two starts but he might just have needed the recent sharpener following a break and can't be passed over too lightly."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Beneficiary",
        "jockey": "Billy Garritty",
        "trainer": "Liam Bailey",
        "ts": "57",
        "rpr": "64",
        "or": "46",
        "form": "227270",
        "sire": "Profitable",
        "dam_sire": "Henrythenavigator",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "43.8",
        "model_pct": "9.4%",
        "fair_odds": "10.68",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-2.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Can lead; has won at both sprint trips on this course; two good runs in classified events during February but below best at Wolverhampton last month and was beaten nearly out of sight back over 5f on turf last time; first-time visor replaces blinkers; others higher up the list."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Stash The Cash (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Duran Fentiman",
        "trainer": "Martin Dunne",
        "ts": "58",
        "rpr": "66",
        "or": "52",
        "form": "57-266",
        "sire": "Profitable",
        "dam_sire": "New Approach",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "42.8",
        "model_pct": "8.2%",
        "fair_odds": "12.14",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-5.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Can lead; on a tempting mark relative to past turf form but he's 0-7 on the AW and has been well beaten since only just failing against Arlington over C&D in January; couldn't count on refitted blinkers, replacing a visor, returning him to form."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Nad Alshiba Snow",
        "jockey": "Kieran O'Neill",
        "trainer": "Mike Murphy",
        "ts": "59",
        "rpr": "67",
        "or": "47",
        "form": "445-54",
        "sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "41.3",
        "model_pct": "6.9%",
        "fair_odds": "14.45",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "-5.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Not yet off the mark but she hasn't always had the rub of the green for this yard and her latest run might have been needed; has run well on Wolverhampton Tapeta but this is her first course run so she does have a slight surface query."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Fumbleinthejungle (GB)",
        "jockey": "Mikkel Mortensen(5)",
        "trainer": "John David Riches",
        "ts": "23",
        "rpr": "57",
        "or": "46",
        "form": "06070-",
        "sire": "Bungle Inthejungle",
        "dam_sire": "Compton Place",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "37.1",
        "model_pct": "4.1%",
        "fair_odds": "24.16",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "-0.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Winless in 12 starts and it was an uphill grind in handicaps last year; wore aids on last two starts but not today; one to watch on return from break."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "The Carligation",
        "jockey": "Jonny Peate",
        "trainer": "J R Jenkins",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",

      }
    ]

        "fair_odds": "2.63",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "+10.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won two in a row at Sandown (1m2f, good) last summer when these blinkers went on and third there (1m2f, soft) next time; appeared unsuited by the step up to 1m4f at Newmarket in October; this lightly raced 4yo is in excellent hands and could rediscover his progressive ways with a big run today."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Sallaal (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Ray Dawson",
        "trainer": "Roger Varian",
        "ts": "104",
        "rpr": "112",
        "or": "102",
        "form": "51135-",
        "sire": "Frankel",
        "dam_sire": "Selkirk",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-11",
        "score": "62.4",
        "model_pct": "17.5%",
        "fair_odds": "5.73",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made it three wins from his first four starts when scoring on handicap debut at Hamilton (8.3f, good) last July; his progress stalled in two Listed races subsequently but this lightly raced 4yo has been gelded since and the return to better ground could be a positive, along with the step up in trip; retains potential for a top trainer who won this in 2018 and 2019; respected."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Rathgar",
        "jockey": "Tom Marquand",
        "trainer": "Jack Channon",
        "ts": "90",
        "rpr": "110",
        "or": "89",
        "form": "300-41",
        "sire": "Ulysses",
        "dam_sire": "Al Kazeem",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "60.6",
        "model_pct": "13.2%",
        "fair_odds": "7.57",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-6.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Beat 13 rivals to win at Newbury (1m2f, good) ten days ago on his second start back from some time off; back up 4lb but he's just 1lb higher than when second in this last year and he's a solid contender."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Parlando",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Ian Williams",
        "ts": "103",
        "rpr": "108",
        "or": "89",
        "form": "-20393",
        "sire": "Dubawi",
        "dam_sire": "Street Cry",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "58.7",
        "model_pct": "9.9%",
        "fair_odds": "10.10",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-12.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two AW wins in December and returned to turf with 3l third of eight at Pontefract (1m2f, good) last Tuesday; might not be far away but there's a suspicion that this exposed 7yo might find a few too good; cheekpieces go on."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Asmen Warrior (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Kieran Shoemark",
        "trainer": "James Owen",
        "ts": "99",
        "rpr": "113",
        "or": "88",
        "form": "2262-2",
        "sire": "Saxon Warrior",
        "dam_sire": "Docksider",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "8-11",
        "score": "56.9",
        "model_pct": "7.5%",
        "fair_odds": "13.28",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "-5.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Runner-up last July-October on three of his first four starts for this yard and he again finished second on this month's reappearance at Thirsk (1m4f, good), albeit no match for the winner; he could build on that latest effort and is not discounted."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Duke's Command",
        "jockey": "James Doyle",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "106",
        "rpr": "110",
        "or": "93",
        "form": "13-876",
        "sire": "Dubawi",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "56.8",
        "model_pct": "7.3%",
        "fair_odds": "13.61",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won at Lingfield (AW) in December on first crack at 1m2f and raced wide when sixth of 14 at Newcastle (1m2f, AW) last month; this two-time turf winner remains unexposed at today's trip and is not ruled out."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Aurel (GER)",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "Ralph Beckett",
        "ts": "92",
        "rpr": "108",
        "or": "93",
        "form": "1/417-",
        "sire": "Soldier Hollow",
        "dam_sire": "Sleeping Indian",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "55.9",
        "model_pct": "6.5%",
        "fair_odds": "15.43",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-5.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Absent since midfield finish in Golden Gates Handicap at Royal Ascot (1m2f, good to firm) last June; gelded since; however, he was 2-3 previously, the wins coming in a maiden at Kempton (1m, AW) and a novice at Leicester (1m2f, good to firm), and he may well have more to offer for his respected trainer."
      }
    ]
  },

      {
        "rank": 1,

        "edge": "+11.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Easily best form when he responded well for pressure to lead late on over C&D last week (first-time cheekpieces); that was from 1lb out of the weights so he's 5lb higher here with a penalty, but that doesn't make him well in."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Montu",
        "jockey": "Alice Bond(7)",
        "trainer": "Jack Jones",
        "ts": "15",
        "rpr": "62",

        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Finished close-up when placed three times in a row in February/March from 9.4f to 1m4f, and Alice Bond removes 7lb today; however, he was beaten about 6l when only seventh of 11 at Wolverhampton (1m4f) last night."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Keep It Classic",
        "jockey": "Cieren Fallon",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "25",
        "rpr": "56",
        "or": "55",

        "fair_odds": "9.48",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-9.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "One of the lesser lights at his strong yard but may show improvement now handicapping upped in distance (from 7f; dam won over this far) and fitted with headgear; market could be informative."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Darkest Red (GB)",

        "edge": "-7.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Gelded after last season and was only 9-2 for his reappearance in a 1m handicap at Lingfield (AW) where he was running on after a wide trip; raised in distance and the dam stayed this far; respected."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Sporty Socks (GB)",

        "ts": "27",

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Seven defeats include four handicaps and she was well held when twice placed; still commands some respect in this modest handicap given she's shown ability and has dropped to a career-low mark."
      },

  {

    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,

        "edge": "-29.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "100,000gns 2yo; sent off 11-1 when making all on her debut over C&D 19 days ago; stable doesn't have many go in first time and the runner-up has won since, so she could be above-average; respected."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Society Kiss (GB)",
        "jockey": "Jack Doughty",
        "trainer": "John Mackie",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "93",
        "or": "86",

        "dam_sire": "Sayif",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "53.5",
        "model_pct": "15.0%",
        "fair_odds": "6.65",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-9.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Both starts for Ralph Beckett last year were at Ascot (5f, good to firm), making a winning debut in May (form worked out well) before finishing in midfield in the Queen Mary the following month; half-sister to a couple of AW winners; market informative on stable debut (same owner) after 314 days off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Reigning Queen",
        "jockey": "David Probert",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Night Of Thunder",
        "dam_sire": "Gregorian",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "51.9",
        "model_pct": "13.5%",
        "fair_odds": "7.40",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-9.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "First foal; dam 5f/6f winner (including 2yo/Group 3; RPR 110), closely related to Swedish 6f winner Siphon River (including 2yo), half-sister to winners Mr Minerals (7f 2yo/1m), Insomnia (7f) and Ormskirk (6f-1m4f); appealing pedigree and makes her debut in a winnable race."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Dance Of Angels (GB)",

        "best_dec": "9.50",

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "In the frame in two starts over 5f at Sandown (good) and Nottingham (good to soft) as a 2yo; stable has had a couple of winners recently and worth a market check on return from seven months off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Queen Sana",
        "jockey": "Sean Kirrane",
        "trainer": "Ollie Sangster",
        "ts": "50",
        "rpr": "82",
        "or": "67",
        "form": "225-30",
        "sire": "Ardad",
        "dam_sire": "Giant's Causeway",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "48.0",
        "model_pct": "10.4%",
        "fair_odds": "9.57",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "+2.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Showed ability when in the frame in four of her first five starts, but she didn't run very well on her handicap debut here (6f) three weeks ago; doesn't seem to be progressing and needs the drop to 5f to make a difference; stable won this last year."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,

        "edge": "+4.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Third of ten on her Chelmsford return (7f, Polytrack) in March, but hasn't gone on in two subsequent starts; needs a resurgence down in tip."
      },

        "spotlight": "26,000euros foal; 11,000euros yearling, 35,000gns breeze-up 2yo; half-sister to winners So Chic (7f/1m AW; RPR 69) and Diego Spirit (Italian 6f 2yo/1m); dam placed 7f in France, sister to 7f-1m6f Flat/2m hurdle winner, half-sister to Italian 5f Listed winner Gamgoom; probably only of interest if backed on debut."
      },

  {

    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Topteam",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "93",
        "rpr": "108",
        "or": "90",
        "form": "1147-1",

        "dam_sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "68.5",
        "model_pct": "45.4%",
        "fair_odds": "2.20",
        "best_dec": "2.75",
        "edge": "+0.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Really likeable sort who scored three times on good ground (1m2f/1m4f) last term, twice coming out on top in tight finishes; gelded before again showing a fine attitude to pick up Kempton handicap (1m4f, AW) on his reappearance three weeks ago; likely won't go down without a fight for his ever-growing fan club."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Sing Us A Song (IRE)",
        "jockey": "James Doyle",
        "trainer": "Ralph Beckett",
        "ts": "92",
        "rpr": "105",
        "or": "95",
        "form": "/1971-",
        "sire": "Camelot",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "59.6",
        "model_pct": "19.6%",
        "fair_odds": "5.12",
        "best_dec": "3.75",
        "edge": "-8.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won heavy-ground Goodwood maiden at two and it was a convincing success on last year's reappearance/handicap debut at Sandown (1m2f, good) one year ago; disappointed at Royal Ascot and Glorious Goodwood subsequently but had been gelded when back on the scoresheet at Haydock (1m6f, good to soft) in September; drops in trip for this comeback but not fully exposed."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Asgard's Captain (IRE)",
        "jockey": "J F Egan",
        "trainer": "Dylan Cunha",
        "ts": "91",
        "rpr": "106",
        "or": "90",
        "form": "132-53",
        "sire": "Make Believe",
        "dam_sire": "Manduro",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "56.7",
        "model_pct": "14.8%",
        "fair_odds": "6.76",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-9.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Last year's winner (good) who ran well in two other appearances over C&D; did well to win at York (1m4f, good to firm) under John Egan in August and arrives here fit after three creditable efforts at Meydan; firm contender."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Night Breeze",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "Ian Williams",
        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "105",
        "or": "87",
        "form": "954034",
        "sire": "New Approach",
        "dam_sire": "Cape Cross",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "54.7",
        "model_pct": "12.3%",
        "fair_odds": "8.13",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-6.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Not disgraced in last year's Northern Dancer over C&D (good; likely softer) on sole start here; also won twice at Ascot (good to firm) last term; back to form on last two starts, latterly when beaten 2l at Musselburgh (also 1m4f, good) on Sunday; should make his presence felt."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Nunc Est Bibendum (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Hollie Doyle",
        "trainer": "Gary & Josh Moore",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "102",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "31-115",
        "sire": "Masar",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "8-4",
        "score": "50.1",
        "model_pct": "8.0%",
        "fair_odds": "12.57",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-1.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ex-Irish mare who secured an AW hat-trick once upped to 2m across December and January but suffered odds-on reversal when dropped to 1m6f in bid for the four-timer; drops further in trip returned to turf (had form on grass in Ireland) on this first start for three months; others more persuasive."
      }
    ]
  },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Lightly raced for a 4yo; seemingly all the better for her comeback run, and the fitting of a hood, when finding the most to lead near the line at Kempton (1m4f, AW) 20 days ago; back up 4lb but in form and probably capable of better."
      },

        "edge": "-1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-8 for Charlie Fellowes; four runs for current yard, the pick when a close fifth over 1m5f at Lingfield (AW) three runs back; pretty poor since and he's now had lots of chances over various distances."
      },

      }

        "spotlight": "In fine form in recent months and bids for a course hat-trick; had half a length to spare over Arth's Gold over this trip last time and is now 3lb worse off, but something appears to have clicked; major player."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Tupero",
        "jockey": "Daniel Tudhope",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "39",
        "rpr": "75",
        "or": "60",
        "form": "86-612",
        "sire": "Frankel",
        "dam_sire": "Le Havre",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "55.8",
        "model_pct": "15.0%",
        "fair_odds": "6.66",
        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "-11.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Showed improvement when off the mark at Newcastle (1m4f, Tapeta) in February and ran at least as well when chasing home a subsequent winner at Catterick (1m4f, good) this month; still unexposed after just six starts and high on the list."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Eagles Whistle",
        "jockey": "Lewis Edmunds",
        "trainer": "Joey Ramsden",
        "ts": "46",
        "rpr": "76",
        "or": "61",
        "form": "116243",
        "sire": "Free Eagle",
        "dam_sire": "Elnadim",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "52.0",
        "model_pct": "9.5%",
        "fair_odds": "10.51",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "-1.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Rattled up a hat-trick in 0-50 classified events on Tapeta for Daragh Bourke (7f-9.5f) in January; has run with credit in her last three starts for this yard, but still has to conclusively prove she wants this far."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Night Bear",
        "jockey": "Jack Doughty",
        "trainer": "Tony Carroll",
        "ts": "60",
        "rpr": "77",
        "or": "56",
        "form": "-42342",
        "sire": "Dragon Pulse",
        "dam_sire": "Dansant",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "51.3",
        "model_pct": "8.8%",
        "fair_odds": "11.34",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "-4.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Just 1-30 on the AW, but the win came over C&D and he was only beaten a head by Jack Andrea here (1m3f) last month; 5lb pull makes him a player even though his losing run is mounting up."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Electric Bass (GB)",
        "jockey": "Jack Mitchell",
        "trainer": "Roger Teal",
        "ts": "62",
        "rpr": "75",
        "or": "57",
        "form": "32255-",
        "sire": "Cable Bay",
        "dam_sire": "Stravinsky",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "50.7",
        "model_pct": "8.2%",
        "fair_odds": "12.23",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-7.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Forced a dead-heat at Kempton (1m4f, Polytrack) in November, but was subsequently demoted so is technically 0-11; return to this trip should suit, but he has been off for 130 days; market useful."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Arth's Gold",
        "jockey": "Joe Leavy",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "67",
        "rpr": "76",
        "or": "61",
        "form": "453720",
        "sire": "Havana Gold",
        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "49.8",
        "model_pct": "7.4%",
        "fair_odds": "13.58",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "-4.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-13 and latest effort on turf was modest, but he was only beaten half a length by Jack Andrea over this C&D the time before (pair clear); 3lb better off and every chance if bouncing back."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Artavian (GB)",
        "jockey": "Paul Mulrennan",
        "trainer": "Patrick Chamings",
        "ts": "57",
        "rpr": "74",
        "or": "58",
        "form": "58992-",
        "sire": "Tasleet",
        "dam_sire": "Danehill Dancer",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "46.8",
        "model_pct": "5.1%",
        "fair_odds": "19.49",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sole success came at Windsor (11.4f, heavy) in October 2024 and ended the last campaign with a fair second of seven at Nottingham (1m2f, soft); off six months and has run well fresh, but others still make greater appeal."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Lednikov",
        "jockey": "David Nolan",
        "trainer": "Ivan Furtado",
        "ts": "66",
        "rpr": "74",
        "or": "58",
        "form": "-88917",
        "sire": "Footstepsinthesand",
        "dam_sire": "Pivotal",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "46.7",
        "model_pct": "5.1%",
        "fair_odds": "19.80",
        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "+1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Often a front-runner and has won here six times, the latest (1m6f) in March; finished well behind a couple of these over C&D last time, though, so has a bit to find."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Spec Of Light",
        "jockey": "Gina Mangan",
        "trainer": "Tony Forbes",
        "ts": "61",
        "rpr": "75",
        "or": "61",
        "form": "5-9727",
        "sire": "Muhaarar",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "45.6",
        "model_pct": "4.4%",
        "fair_odds": "22.50",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+0.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Patchy form since gaining his sole success here (1m) 13 months ago, but has run well on a couple of occasions over middle-distances on this track during that period; each-way claims if producing his best."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Shaffron (GB)",
        "jockey": "Jason Hart",
        "trainer": "David Menuisier",
        "ts": "45",
        "rpr": "73",
        "or": "63",
        "form": "39459-",
        "sire": "Sea The Moon",
        "dam_sire": "Intikhab",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "43.3",
        "model_pct": "3.4%",
        "fair_odds": "29.77",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-5.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Hinted at ability in five starts on turf/Polytrack last year without progressing; drops in grade on her return from 197 days off, but may be best watched unless attracting support."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Epsom",
    "time": "16:23",
    "race_name": "Betfred 'Nifty 50' Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Timber Twelve",
        "jockey": "Hector Crouch",
        "trainer": "Michael Bell",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "1-1",
        "sire": "Ulysses",
        "dam_sire": "Singspiel",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-11",
        "score": "61.0",
        "model_pct": "31.2%",
        "fair_odds": "3.20",
        "best_dec": "3.75",
        "edge": "+5.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Overcame a wide stall when springing 28-1 surprise at Kempton in September and kept unbeaten record when defying a penalty on his return at Southwell (also 1m, AW) five weeks ago; will likely be going up in trip soon enough but brings plenty of potential to this turf/handicap debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "On Message (GB)",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "Ralph Beckett",
        "ts": "68",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "80",
        "form": "451-",
        "sire": "Camelot",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "60.2",
        "model_pct": "27.7%",
        "fair_odds": "3.62",
        "best_dec": "2.88",
        "edge": "-9.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Promise on first two starts (good to firm/soft) and she made all on AW debut at Wolverhampton (7f) in October; should do better at this trip and beyond (holds Oaks and Irish Oaks entries) this term; interesting on her reappearance and handicap debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Terranoble (GB)",
        "jockey": "Hollie Doyle",
        "trainer": "Denis Coakley",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "70",
        "form": "7-31",
        "sire": "Ubettabelieveit",
        "dam_sire": "Dawn Approach",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "55.5",
        "model_pct": "14.0%",
        "fair_odds": "7.15",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "+4.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "All starts around 1m on AW; only made his debut in December but that was an eyecatching effort and he improved on third start to land Wolverhampton novice in January; potential to do better again on this turf/handicap debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Montague Menace",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "40",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "81",
        "form": "489-1",
        "sire": "Mehmas",
        "dam_sire": "Golden Horn",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-10",
        "score": "54.5",
        "model_pct": "12.0%",
        "fair_odds": "8.36",
        "best_dec": "3.00",
        "edge": "-21.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Gelded ahead of his AW debut when readily landing Lingfield maiden (7f) on last month's return; will probably need more on this switch back to turf/handicap debut but it's still early days and he warrants consideration."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Mayaada",
        "jockey": "Pierre-Louis Jamin",
        "trainer": "Ollie Sangster",
        "ts": "86",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "74",
        "form": "1307-9",
        "sire": "Phoenix Of Spain",
        "dam_sire": "Fastnet Rock",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "52.6",
        "model_pct": "9.1%",
        "fair_odds": "10.99",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Busy as a juvenile when her nine runs yielded one win; that did come here (7f, good) in August but was quiet on last two starts and virtually tailed off on last month's AW comeback; return to this venue might help, and a handicapping case can be made, but otherwise has plenty to prove."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Assaranca",
        "jockey": "Sean Levey",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "73",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "71",
        "form": "2716-6",
        "sire": "Ghaiyyath",
        "dam_sire": "Dark Angel",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "49.8",
        "model_pct": "6.1%",
        "fair_odds": "16.50",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Off the mark on her eighth start as a juvenile when landing Nottingham nursery (good, made all) over this trip in October; not disgraced in Listed company next time but weakened over 1m2f (good to soft) on her reappearance one month ago; might do better back at this distance with the run behind her."
      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Epsom",
    "time": "16:58",
    "race_name": "Betfred 'In Celebration Of Mark Friar' Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m",

    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Tribal Rhythm",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Denis Coakley",
        "ts": "85",
        "rpr": "99",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "7060-2",

        "stall": 6,

        "best_dec": "3.25",
        "edge": "+1.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Returned from seven months off to win this race from off the pace last year; couldn't build on that in four subsequent starts last season but was back down to that winning mark when slightly unlucky second at Bath (1m, also good) on his resumption three weeks ago; of firm interest."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Mr Baloo",
        "jockey": "Sean Levey",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "100",
        "or": "81",
        "form": "-64821",

        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "58.3",
        "model_pct": "13.8%",
        "fair_odds": "7.23",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-5.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "7f nursery winner here (good; has won on good to firm) in 2023; landed seventh AW win when scoring at Lingfield (1m; first-time cheekpieces, retained) a fortnight ago; has won off higher marks than this and must be considered on his return to turf."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Kaleido (GB)",
        "jockey": "James Doyle",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "80",
        "rpr": "96",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "/3319-",
        "sire": "Make Believe",
        "dam_sire": "Raven's Pass",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "58.2",
        "model_pct": "13.7%",
        "fair_odds": "7.33",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Placed on soft and fast ground in his first three maidens (7f/1m) before landing the odds with comfortable win at Yarmouth (7f, good) in July; made favourite for handicap debut but weakened to finish ninth at Glorious Goodwood (1m, heavy; Knights Gold third) a fortnight later; bought for 21,000gns in October and subsequently gelded; retains plenty of potential ahead of this seasonal/stable debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Sweet Reward (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Olivia Tubb(5)",
        "trainer": "Jonathan Portman",
        "ts": "92",
        "rpr": "99",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "36557-",
        "sire": "Acclamation",
        "dam_sire": "Desert Style",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "54.9",
        "model_pct": "8.0%",
        "fair_odds": "12.55",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "-4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Seven wins include five off higher marks than this and one at this track (1m2f, good to soft; has won on good) in 2023; this trip might be on the short side but he went close on his reappearance in 2024 (1m2f) and scored off 2lb higher on his comeback last term (1m2f); not readily dismissed."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Carnival Day (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Hector Crouch",
        "trainer": "Jim Boyle",
        "ts": "80",
        "rpr": "96",
        "or": "79",
        "form": "34624-",
        "sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "54.3",
        "model_pct": "7.2%",
        "fair_odds": "13.89",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-5.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Respectable fourth in the Great Metropolitan on last year's card; one win last year but it did come here in July and he was a respectable second at this track (also 1m2f, good to soft; has won on good) in September; below par over 1m on his final start in October and this trip again asks a question; market might help ahead of his comeback."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Amused (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Pierre-Louis Jamin",
        "trainer": "Jim Boyle",
        "ts": "91",
        "rpr": "93",
        "or": "71",
        "form": "02555-",
        "sire": "No Nay Never",
        "dam_sire": "Kingman",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "8-9",
        "score": "53.5",
        "model_pct": "6.3%",
        "fair_odds": "15.92",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ex-French gelding who was unraced at two; made all to land Vichy claimer (very soft) in August and went mighty close for this yard in Leicester seller (good) in October; 25-1 and raced wide before solid fifth of 12 at Kempton (also 7f, AW) when last seen in December; cheekpieces enlisted for second go at this sort of trip and he's not ruled out on return."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Knights Gold",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "Dr Richard Newland & Jamie Insole",
        "ts": "84",
        "rpr": "97",
        "or": "84",
        "form": "717-90",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Gold Away",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "52.8",
        "model_pct": "5.5%",
        "fair_odds": "18.07",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Five handicap wins (7f to 1m; four in a hood) in a productive 2025, including on a fast surface, and he looked unlucky when third of 15 at Glorious Goodwood (1m, heavy; Kaleido ninth) in July; probably needed reappearance in March and likely didn't stay 1m2f when never competitive three weeks later; this mark demands a return to his best, though."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Shafdar",
        "jockey": "Edward Greatrex",
        "trainer": "Ian Williams",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "94",
        "or": "84",
        "form": "5-3120",
        "sire": "Make Believe",
        "dam_sire": "Le Havre",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "52.4",
        "model_pct": "5.2%",
        "fair_odds": "19.12",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "-7.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "All starts on AW for this yard and he justified cramped odds when easily landing four-runner Chelmsford maiden (1m) in February; promising handicap debut when second over that C&D the following month and can be excused a lesser effort in highly competitive Good Friday event three weeks later; unexposed, particularly on this surface, and he warrants consideration."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Tronido",
        "jockey": "Hollie Doyle",
        "trainer": "Simon Dow",
        "ts": "80",
        "rpr": "97",
        "or": "66",
        "form": "40-805",
        "sire": "Aclaim",
        "dam_sire": "Point Given",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "8-4",
        "score": "51.8",
        "model_pct": "4.7%",
        "fair_odds": "21.26",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "-0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Four-time winner who won at Sandown in August and followed up by 6l over C&D (soft; acts on good) in September; just 2lb above that latter winning mark but there hasn't been much encouragement in three AW starts this term."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Organ (GB)",
        "jockey": "Harry Davies",
        "trainer": "Martyn Meade",
        "ts": "70",
        "rpr": "94",
        "or": "85",
        "form": "11500-",
        "sire": "Ulysses",
        "dam_sire": "Pivotal",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "51.7",
        "model_pct": "4.7%",
        "fair_odds": "21.37",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "-1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Completed a hat-trick over 7f/1m on good/good to firm across May and June last year; form tailed off markedly from August onwards but he returns just 2lb above his last winning mark; market support would bring him into the picture."
      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Yarmouth",
    "time": "17:03",
    "race_name": "Get Raceday Ready Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "6f",
    "going": "Good To Firm",
    "class": "Class 6",
    "draw_bias": "low",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Griselda (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Cieren Fallon",
        "trainer": "Henrietta C Knight",
        "ts": "59",
        "rpr": "66",
        "or": "47",
        "form": "988642",
        "sire": "Kodi Bear",
        "dam_sire": "Lawman",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "53.9",
        "model_pct": "18.7%",
        "fair_odds": "5.35",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won three nurseries for George Scott; not the same filly now but handicapped accordingly and went close at Southwell (6f, AW) 17 days ago."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Moonhall Lass",
        "jockey": "Silvestre De Sousa",
        "trainer": "James Owen",
        "ts": "77",
        "rpr": "66",
        "or": "45",
        "form": "076-03",
        "sire": "Dandy Man",
        "dam_sire": "Singspiel",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "53.6",
        "model_pct": "18.1%",
        "fair_odds": "5.51",
        "best_dec": "3.75",
        "edge": "-8.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Failed to win in 22 Irish starts but made a positive debut for James Owen when a close third at Southwell (6f, AW); likely contender with cheekpieces back on (ran okay in them when tried once in Ireland)."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "No Gain",
        "jockey": "Pat Cosgrave",
        "trainer": "Adam Kirby",
        "ts": "45",
        "rpr": "62",
        "or": "46",
        "form": "651-46",
        "sire": "Territories",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "53.4",
        "model_pct": "17.8%",
        "fair_odds": "5.62",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Tried all sorts of trips for previous yard but still quite lightly raced; tongue-tie and cheekpieces fitted for her two runs for current yard, only 2l away on the first occasion (6f) and the drop back to 5f found her out last time; could be interesting returned to 6f with blinkers given a go."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Dion Baker (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Neil Callan",
        "trainer": "Michael Wigham",
        "ts": "52",
        "rpr": "63",
        "or": "50",
        "form": "486-57",
        "sire": "Ribchester",
        "dam_sire": "Le Havre",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "47.0",
        "model_pct": "10.2%",
        "fair_odds": "9.80",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-7.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has been struggling on the AW but he's 0-30 in that scene and all four wins have been on turf, albeit over 7f; lurks on a dangerous mark but this trip is not ideal."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Sir Rodneyredblood (GB)",
        "jockey": "Marco Ghiani",
        "trainer": "J R Jenkins",
        "ts": "37",
        "rpr": "63",
        "or": "47",
        "form": "-12583",
        "sire": "Roderic O'Connor",
        "dam_sire": "Red Ransom",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "45.3",
        "model_pct": "8.8%",
        "fair_odds": "11.41",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-2.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Chelmsford specialist who ran another sound race there on final start in March; only 1-17 on turf but has course form and this mark gives him a chance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Grand Citadel",
        "jockey": "Grace McEntee",
        "trainer": "Micky Fenton",
        "ts": "58",
        "rpr": "63",
        "or": "52",
        "form": "-54945",
        "sire": "Ribchester",
        "dam_sire": "Cadeaux Genereux",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "44.9",
        "model_pct": "8.5%",
        "fair_odds": "11.83",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-5.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Only win was at 7f and four of her last five races have been at 1m; stuck around here 17 days ago despite developing a clear lead and expect similar tactics back at 6f."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Edergole's Gift (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Mason Paetel(5)",
        "trainer": "Conrad Allen",
        "ts": "46",
        "rpr": "65",
        "or": "54",
        "form": "-20630",
